title: T-022 — UI: Dept Close modal (dept_close_modal prototype) with required checklist
prompt:
# T-022 — Dept Close modal UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.3 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md dept_close_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:143-191 (dept_close_modal)

## Goal
Client Component modal showing required-fields checklist for the chosen dept (server-checked via getRequiredFieldsForDept), enabling Confirm only when all required green, calling closeDeptSection action.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/dept-close-modal.tsx 'use client'. Reads server action getRequiredFieldsForDept(productCode, dept) returning [{name, ok}]. Renders shadcn Dialog with checklist using Check/X icons, optional Reason Textarea (z.string().min(10) when present), Confirm Button enabled iff allPass. On submit calls closeDeptSection and refreshes route.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/dept-close-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/__tests__/dept-close-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/get-required-fields-for-dept.ts [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:143-191 (dept_close_modal), then it shows the same dept header, the same checklist row pattern (label + pass/fail icon), the optional reason Textarea, and uses shadcn Dialog+Checkbox+Textarea+Button primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given a missing required field returned by server, when modal renders, then Confirm button is disabled and the row shows X icon
3. Given allPass returned and reason >=10 chars (when shown), when Confirm clicked, then closeDeptSection is called and route refreshes

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests for parity, disabled state, action invocation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test dept-close-modal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow Confirm when any required field is missing
- Do not skip reason validation when textarea visible
- Do not call DB from client component

pipeline_inputs.description: Dept Close modal with server-checked required-fields checklist + optional reason; calls closeDeptSection.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity items: same dept header, same checklist row pattern (label + icon), optional reason textarea, Confirm/Cancel buttons, shadcn primitives only. Server action computes pass/fail per required col.
out_of_scope: Do not implement reopen flow UI here
Do not include MFA gate (handled in d365 build flow)
